name: Houtini LM
description: MCP server that connects Claude to any OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint. Offload routine analysis to a local model and preserve your Claude context window.

environmentVariables.name: HOUTINI_LM_ENDPOINT_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:1234, https://openrouter.ai/api). Legacy alias: LM_STUDIO_URL.

environmentVariables.name: HOUTINI_LM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for API authentication (no auth if blank). Legacy aliases: LM_STUDIO_PASSWORD, LM_PASSWORD, OPENROUTER_API_KEY.

environmentVariables.name: HOUTINI_LM_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model identifier to use for requests (auto-detected if not set). Legacy alias: LM_STUDIO_MODEL.

environmentVariables.name: HOUTINI_LM_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Optional provider override: 'openrouter' forces OpenRouter-specific handling (attribution headers, reasoning.exclude, no inference serialisation). Auto-detected from the endpoint URL when possible.
